title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!
